title: 2 Piece 38MM Different Red Safety Padlock Set with Key with Circuit Breaker Safety Lock Padlock Loto Tag Safety Padlock Meets The Requirements of Industrial Electrical Latch Tagging Kits
features: 【Full Set】: 2 x Safety Padlock, 4 x Keys, 2 x Miniature Circuit Breaker Lockout , 2 x Tag Safety Plates, This lockout tagout kit is easy to mount to any surface.

【Widely used: Application】: Widely used in power switch, gas switch, pipeline valves, mechanical fixed moving parts, places where warnings need to be highlighted, places where authority management is required, and locking of all kinds of single and double pole circuit breakers.

【EASY TO USE】: No tools are required for the installation of the miniature circuit breaker lock, just press the button and the installation can be completed easily. Comes with a storage bag for easy storage.
【Dimension】The length of padlock beam is 38MM.Clamp type circuit breaker lock can lock almost all miniature ISO/DIN circuit breakers in the world.

【Impact Resistance】: The insulated locking beam is made of imported PA nylon, which ensures strength and is not easy to deform and break. The circuit breaker lock is made of engineering plastic reinforced nylon PA, which is strong and durable, effectively preventing accidental opening.
description: Product Description Advantage: Lockout locks made of Zinc and PA nylon , corrosion-resistant stainless steel shackle, built to endure long term heavy industrial use. The insulating lock beam is made of imported PA nylon, which not only ensures the strength but is not easy to deform and break. The key is made of iron, strong and durable, and matches the lock closely The latch is strong and durable, the surface is smooth, not easy to rust, excellent workmanship for your protection Fitted with a special limiter for security padlocks. Limiters can effectively and securely guard the places you want to guard! There is a dedicated area set up for writable labels to be used to mark the. USE WIDELY Safety Lockout Padlock is designed exclusively for Lockout/Tagout applications.Widely applied in Power source switch,air source switch,pipeline valve,mechanically fixed moving parts,where you need to highlight the warning,the places where permission management is required ,lockout a variety of single and double-pole breakers etc. Other Best Selling Products SECURITY PADLOCK Add To Basket WINDOW RESTRICTOR Add To Basket CYLINDER LOCK Buying Options DOOR HINGE Add To Basket DOOR VIEWER Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 6 4.4 out of 5 stars 137 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,008 4.6 out of 5 stars 77 4.3 out of 5 stars 246 Material Alloy zinc Alloy zinc Brass Steel Brass Easy Installation ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Anti-Rust ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ High Quality ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Good Durability ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
